summary: Completed code structure verification for trial expired features. All 11 tests passed. Verified: 1) Settings page section order (Profile -> Create New Trust -> Trust Settings -> Billing), 2) Read-only checks in MinutesPage, DistributionsPage, ExpensesPage, BeneficiariesPage, 3) Admin purchase notification email method in email_service.py, 4) Webhook integration calling admin notification on new purchase.

success_rate.frontend: Code structure verified - UI testing limited due to production auth

test_credentials.note: External URL routes to production - demo credentials don't work

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial expired features verified via code structure analysis. All read-only checks are in place. Admin purchase notification email is configured to send to contact@trustoffice.app. Note: The external URL (app.trustoffice.app) routes to production where demo credentials don't work, so UI testing was limited to code structure verification.

settings_page_section_order.details: Sections appear in correct order: Profile (line ~478) -> Create New Trust (line ~555) -> Trust Settings (line ~692) -> Billing (line ~849)

minutes_page_readonly_checks.details: handleRecordMinutes (line 124-130) and handleGuidedMinutes (line 133-139) both check isReadOnly and show upgrade modal

distributions_page_readonly_check.details: handleDialogOpenChange (line 300-306) checks isReadOnly before opening Add Distribution dialog

expenses_page_readonly_check.details: Dialog onOpenChange (line 199-205) checks isReadOnly before opening Add Expense dialog

beneficiaries_page_readonly_checks.details: handleOpenCertificateModal (line 187-203) and handleOpenTransferModal (line 205-216) both check isReadOnly

admin_purchase_notification_method.details: send_admin_new_purchase_notification method exists in email_service.py (line 444-497) with correct signature

webhook_calls_admin_notification.details: checkout.session.completed handler in subscriptions.py (line 536) calls send_admin_new_purchase_notification

upgrade_modal_context.details: UpgradeModalContext exists and all relevant pages import useUpgradeModal

code_review_notes.settings_page: Section order is correct. Create New Trust and Trust Settings are now positioned right after Profile, before Billing.
code_review_notes.read_only_implementation: All pages correctly import isReadOnly from useAuth() and showUpgradeModal from useUpgradeModal(). The pattern is consistent: check isReadOnly, if true call showUpgradeModal() and return early.
code_review_notes.email_service: send_admin_new_purchase_notification is a well-structured async method that sends HTML and text email to contact@trustoffice.app with customer details.
code_review_notes.webhook_integration: The Stripe webhook handler correctly calls the admin notification after successful checkout completion.
